description: Tests that diagnose builds a feedback loop and reproduces before hypothesising, then fixes with a regression test

tests.prompt: David säger att scanningen inte funkar i produktion. Diagnostisera.
tests.expected_output_description: Build a reproduction loop first, reproduce, then ranked hypotheses

assertions.check: Output prioritizes building a reproduction / feedback loop before attempting a fix
Output mentions reproducing the actual failure the user described before hypothesising
Output generates multiple (e.g. 3-5) ranked, falsifiable hypotheses rather than guessing one cause
Output mentions checking logs or instrumenting the failing code path
Output mentions a regression test or verifying the original repro no longer reproduces after the fix

tests.prompt: Betalningen gick igenom men användaren fick inga credits.
tests.expected_output_description: Reproduce the webhook path, hypothesise, instrument

assertions.check: Output mentions building a way to reproduce or replay the payment/webhook event
Output lists more than one falsifiable hypothesis for where the credit grant fails
Output mentions instrumenting or checking logs at the boundaries (Stripe webhook, DB update)
